title: DeviantArt - The Largest Online Art Gallery and Community
meta_description: DeviantArt is where art and community thrive. Explore over 350 million pieces of art while connecting to fellow artists and art enthusiasts.

[DEVIATION] For over 16 years, @augenweide has been a steady and inspiring presence in the photography community. His gallery is a masterclass in restraint and intention, featuring black-and-white landscapes that invite stillness, reflection, and a deeper way of seeing. From fog drifting between trees to the hush of freshly fallen snow, his work transforms quiet moments in nature into visuals that feel both poetic and profoundly human. Beyond his own artistry, @augenweide has played a meaningful role in shaping the spirit and standards of DeviantArt photography. Through his leadership in multiple quality-focused groups, thoughtful critiques, and steadfast Team 240 204 March 2026 Community Group challenges by moonbeam13, journal March 2026 Community Group challenges Mar 2, 2026 Each month, Community Groups across DeviantArt host creative challenges for their members, offering an opportunity to earn that month’s shared Profile badge. [DEVIATION] 🌊 March theme: Art in motion Make art inspired by change, reflection, and the creative momentum that carries us from one season to the next. Experiment and capture the flow of transition in your work! 🎨 March 2026 Community Group challenges @DevNews - March Group Badge Challenge @Traditionalists - March Badge Challenge: Art in Motion @StockandResources - Tips, Tricks and Tutorials: The Challenge @CRPhotography - March in Motion challenge @CRLiterature - Earn a badge for your Words in Motion 🏅 How to earn the badge Participate in any of the challenges listed above and follow the instructions in that Group’s journal. When you’re done creating and ready to submit your deviation, make sure to include #ArtinMotion under Tags before submission. Check out @DeviantAI for AI specific contests. Thanks! [DEVIATION] Join @CRLiterature in reporting on some of our favorite fictional unknowns by writing fun fan fictions based on popular films and television shows 📽️📺 Ponder pop culture’s most perplexing puzzles as we prompt you to provide fans with a satisfying conclusion to cliffhangers and open-ended mysteries in 250 words or less 🧑‍💻🤩 Get inspired to write about worlds you know and love & you might just pick up some rewards along the way 🏅🏆 In the far future a purposeful robot named Wall-E made an intrepid adventure for love, making friends along the way and having an unforeseen influence on the balance of nature. Here is a glimpse of his life https://youtu.be/bpqVe3GvUZU?si=PHNfTGiRL4xhzVsS [VIDEO] If you need more information on his life you are free to read the screenplay to a film about his life. From colorful photo hunts to quirky challenges, fan fiction, and tutorials that push your skills, this month invites you to experiment, explore, and celebrate your imagination. Whether you’re creating for joy, community, or a little friendly chaos, there’s something here to inspire you. His black and white landscapes are studies in patience and restraint, inviting us to slow down and really see what’s in front of us. We’re proud to celebrate him as March’s Deviousness recipient. Revisit 2025's tutorials! by Team, journal Missed a badge? Revisit 2025's tutorials! Jan 5, 2026 2025 was a fantastically artistic year, bringing you imaginative tutorials from some of our most talented deviants. If your badge collection feels incomplete, no worries — you can still dive in! Revisit and complete one (or all!) of these tutorials, gain new skills, and earn beautiful badges. 2025 badge lineup Butterfly Tutorial | Horse Head tutorial | Landscape Tutorial | Lighting Tutorial | Bird Tutorial Gotta catch ‘em all Did you know you can still collect all the incredible badges from years past? Complete any or all of the tutorials and share your finished piece in the comments below. 2024 Badges | 2023 Badges | 2022 Badges | Even More Badges How to earn tutorial badges Each tutorial includes a special hashtag that unlocks your badge. When you’re done creating and before clicking Submit, make sure to enter the hashtag under Tags exactly as it appears in the journal. 🔥 Pro tip: Copy/paste for the win (and the badge)! Once your deviation goes live, doublecheck that Team 188 449 Fan Art Friday - The Magicians by moonbeam13, journal Fan Art Friday - The Magicians Jan 16, 2026 Fillory is calling! This week’s Fan Art Friday is dedicated to The Magicians, the beloved TV series inspired by Lev Grossman’s novels. From Brakebills classrooms to spell-casting chaos, complex friendships, and worlds that refuse to stay neatly separated, The Magicians has inspired artists to explore magic that’s messy, emotional, and deeply human. We’re showcasing fan art that captures the heart, humor, and heartbreak of the series. “Did I do something brave to save my friends, or did I finally find a way to kill myself?” — Quentin Coldwater “Life is basically a solo sport. But sometimes you need a team.” — Eliot Waugh Whether you fell in love with the characters, the worlds, or the beautifully broken way magic works, the fandom continues to keep The Magicians alive through art. Thank you to everyone sharing their passion, creativity, and love for this series because magic may not fix everything, but art helps us feel it all. Explore previous editions in our Fan Art moonbeam13 17 42 Join DeviantArt's Ambassador program! by moonbeam13, journal Join DeviantArt's Ambassador program! Nov 28, 2024 DeviantArt is proud to announce a new opportunity for deviants to contribute to the community at a deeper level! The Ambassador program is designed to give deviants a chance to bring artists together, offer ways for artists to hone their skills or try new things, and help shape the future of the community. Deviants eligible to participate in the Ambassador program are those who are co-founders or top contributors of official DeviantArt groups or affiliated groups. There are many factors that determine whether or not deviants might be a good fit for the Ambassador program, but all potential ambassadors should: Frequently run or organize community events Routinely be active participants in their community Consistently encourage and cheer on other artists Ambassadors will have direct contact with and support from DeviantArt team members when hosting events and challenges, to help their projects thrive. Are you ready to be a community ambassador? [DEVIATION] moonbeam13 146 315 Palette Photo Hunt Challenge by AlexanderPaupoff, journal Palette Photo Hunt Challenge Mar 3, 2026 [GIF] Hello, and Happy Holi, everyone! It's the Festival of Colours once again [EMOTE] Holi heralds the arrival of Spring with all of its vitality and colour. And while it might be primarily an Indian celebration, it's observed in many parts of the world. This year, we're celebrating Holi with a unique photo hunt challenge [EMOTE] But don't worry, the rules are simple and everyone is welcome to participate! Palette Photo Hunt Challenge Create a photo collage inspired by a free-to-use colour palette. How to participate? Select any free-to-use colour palette with at least 3 colours. Use your mobile phone camera to click a photo for each colour in the palette. Create a collage of the photos you take using any free app. Upload it to your gallery with the #Holi2026 tag and the chosen colour palette in the description. Submit it to the contest folder, and post your entry in the comments below. Rules This is a photo hunt, so it is a photography only challenge.
